title: DataFrame — Columnar Data Operations
description: Sovereign columnar DataFrame engine: create tables from JSON, compute summary statistics (mean, std, min, max, count, median), filter rows by condition, group by columns with aggregation, sort, select/drop columns, and join two DataFrames on shared keys. Pure Rust via nexcore-dataframe.

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create a DataFrame from JSON column data. Input: object mapping column names to arrays of values. Returns schema and row count.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values, e.g. {"drug": ["ASP","MET"], "count": [10,5]}

tools.name: describe
tools.description: Compute summary statistics for a numeric column: count, non_null, mean, std_dev, min, max, median. Provide the full DataFrame as columns and the target column name.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: Name of the column to describe

tools.name: filter
tools.description: Filter rows where a column meets a condition. Operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains (string substring). Returns the filtered DataFrame as JSON.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: Column to filter on

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Comparison: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to compare against (numbers as strings)

tools.name: group-by
tools.description: Group rows by one or more columns and compute aggregations. Agg types: sum, mean, min, max, count, first, last, n_unique. Each agg specifies type and target column.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values

parameters.name: group_cols
parameters.description: Column names to group by

parameters.name: aggs
parameters.description: Array of {"type": "sum"|"mean"|..., "column": "col_name"} (column omitted for count)

tools.name: sort
tools.description: Sort a DataFrame by a column. Returns sorted rows as JSON.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values

parameters.name: by
parameters.description: Column name to sort by

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: Sort descending (default false)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Return only first N rows after sorting (head)

tools.name: select
tools.description: Select a subset of columns from a DataFrame, optionally dropping columns instead.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Column name to array of values

parameters.name: keep
parameters.description: Column names to keep (mutually exclusive with drop)

parameters.name: drop
parameters.description: Column names to drop (mutually exclusive with keep)

tools.name: join
tools.description: Join two DataFrames on shared key columns. Join types: inner, left, right, outer, semi, anti. Provide left and right DataFrames as separate column objects and the key column names.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Left DataFrame: column name to array of values

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Right DataFrame: column name to array of values

parameters.name: on
parameters.description: Key column names present in both DataFrames

parameters.name: how
parameters.description: Join type: inner (default), left, right, outer, semi, anti
